name: Hot Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken or turkey into bite-size strips.
2. For the dressing, stir together apple juice, vinegar, green onions, water, cornstarch, salt, mustard, celery seed, and pepper in a bowl; set aside.
3. Spray a cold 12-inch skillet with nonstick cooking spray. Preheat over medium heat.
4. Add chicken to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, for 1 to 2 minutes or until heated through.
5. Stir in the dressing and cook, stirring frequently, until thickened and bubbly, about 2 more minutes.
6. Toss together spinach and cabbage in a separate bowl. Add to the skillet with chicken and stir until spinach begins to wilt, about 1 minute.
7. Stir in sliced radishes (if using). Transfer salad to a serving bowl. Garnish with whole radishes and celery leaves if desired. Serve immediately.
Makes 4 servings
Food Exchange per Serving: 2 Lean Meat Exchanges + 1 Vegetable Exchange
